Antidote.description: A spray-type medicine. It lifts the effect of poison from one Pokémon.

Awakening.description: A spray-type medicine. It awakens a Pokémon from the clutches of sleep.

Berry Juice.description: A 100% pure juice made of Berries. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by just 20 points.

Burn Heal.description: A spray-type medicine. It heals a single Pokémon that is suffering from a burn.

Casteliacone.description: A specialty of Castelia City. It will restore the status afflictions of one Pokemon.

Elixir.description: It restores the PP of all the moves learned by the targeted Pokémon by 10 points each.

Energy Root.description: A very bitter root. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 200 points.

EnergyPowder.description: A very bitter medicine powder. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 50 points.

Ether.description: It restores the PP of a Pokémon's selected move by a maximum of 10 points.

Fresh Water.description: Water with a high mineral content. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 50 points.

Full Heal.description: A spray-type medicine. It heals all the status problems of a single Pokémon.

Full Restore.description: A medicine that fully restores the HP and heals any status problems of a single Pokémon.

Heal Powder.description: A very bitter medicine powder. It heals all the status problems of a single Pokémon.

Hyper Potion.description: A spray-type medicine for wounds. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 200 points.

Ice Heal.description: A spray-type medicine. It defrosts a Pokémon that has been frozen solid.

Lava Cookie.description: Lavaridge Town's local specialty. It heals all the status problems of one Pokémon.

Lemonade.description: A very sweet drink. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 80 points.

Max Elixir.description: It fully restores the PP of all the moves learned by the targeted Pokémon.

Max Ether.description: It fully restores the PP of a single selected move that has been learned by the target Pokémon.

Max Potion.description: A spray-type medicine for wounds. It completely restores the HP of a single Pokémon.

Max Revive.description: A medicine that revives a fainted Pokémon. It fully restores the Pokémon's HP.

Moomoo Milk.description: Milk with a very high nutrition content. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 100 points.

Old Gateau.description: Old Chateau's hidden specialty. It heals all the status problems of a single Pokémon.

Parlyz Heal.description: A spray-type medicine. It eliminates paralysis from a single Pokémon.

Potion.description: A spray-type medicine for wounds. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by just 20 points.

Ragecandybar.description: A delicacy from the Johto Region. Heals all status problems.

Revival Herb.description: A very bitter medicinal herb. It revives a fainted Pokémon, fully restoring its HP.

Revive.description: A medicine that revives a fainted Pokémon. It restores half the Pokémon's maximum HP.

Sacred Ash.description: It revives all fainted Pokémon. In doing so, it also fully restores their HP.

Soda Pop.description: A fizzy soda drink. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 60 points.

Super Potion.description: A spray-type medicine for wounds. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 50 points.

Sweet Heart.description: A very sugary chocolate. It restores one Pokemon's HP by 20.

Dire Hit.description: An item that raises the critical-hit ratio of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

Guard Spec..description: An item that prevents stat reduction among the Trainer's party Pokémon for five turns after use.

X Accuracy.description: An item that raises the accuracy of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

X Attack.description: An item that raises the Attack stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

X Defend.description: An item that raises the Defense stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

X Sp. Def.description: An item that raises the Sp. Def stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

X Special.description: An item that raises the Sp. Atk stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

X Speed.description: An item that raises the Speed stat of a Pokémon in battle. It wears off if the Pokémon is withdrawn.

Absorb Bulb.description: A disposable bulb. If it is held, when the Pokemon receives a Water-type attack its Special Attack rises.

Adamant Orb.description: A brightly gleaming orb to be held by DIALGA. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Steel-type moves.

Air Balloon.description: If held by a Pokémon it will float in the air. Will break if hit by an attack.

Amulet Coin.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It doubles a battle's prize money if the holding Pokémon joins in.

Big Root.description: A Pokémon held item that boosts the power of HP-stealing moves to let the holder recover more HP.

Binding Band.description: A band that aids with moves that require applying pressure to the opponent. If held moves that apply pressure will have their Power increased.

Black Belt.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a belt that boosts determination and Fighting-type moves.

Black Sludge.description: A held item that gradually restores the HP of Poison-type Pokémon. It inflicts damage on all other types.

BlackGlasses.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a shady-looking pair of glasses that boosts Dark-type moves.

Blue Scarf.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the “Beauty” aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh.

BrightPowder.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It casts a tricky glare that lowers the opponent's accuracy.

Bug Gem.description: A Bug-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Bug-type move one time if held.

Burn Drive.description: A Cassette that makes the move called Techno Buster become Fire-type if held by Genesect.

Cell Battery.description: A disposable rechargeable battery. If it is held, when the Pokemon receives an Electric-type attack its Attack rises.

Charcoal.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a combustible fuel that boosts the power of Fire-type moves.

Chill Drive.description: A Cassette that makes the move called Techno Buster become Ice-type if held by Genesect.

Choice Band.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This headband ups Attack, but allows the use of only one kind of move.

Choice Scarf.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This scarf boosts Speed, but allows the use of only one kind of move.

Choice Specs.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These distinctive glasses boost Sp. Atk, but allow only one kind of move to be used.

Cleanse Tag.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away if the holder is the first one in the party.

Damp Rock.description: A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Rain Dance used by the holder.

Dark Gem.description: A Dark-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Dark-type move one time if held.

DeepSeaScale.description: An item to be held by CLAMPERL. A scale that shines a faint pink, it raises the Sp. Def stat.

DeepSeaTooth.description: An item to be held by CLAMPERL. A fang that gleams a sharp silver, it raises the Sp. Atk stat.

Destiny Knot.description: A long, thin, bright red string to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder becomes infatuated, the foe does too.

Douse Drive.description: A Cassette that makes the move called Techno Buster become Water-type if held by Genesect.

Draco Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Dragon-type moves.

Dragon Fang.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a hard and sharp fang that ups the power of Dragon-type moves.

Dragon Gem.description: A Dragon-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Dragon-type move one time if held.

Dread Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Dark-type moves.

Dubious Disc.description: A transparent device overflowing with dubious data. Its producer is unknown.

Earth Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Ground-type moves.

Eject Button.description: If it is held, when you are hit by an attack the Pokemon can escape the battle-field and switch places with a team member.

Electirizer.description: A box packed with a tremendous amount of electric energy. It is loved by a certain Pokémon.

Electric Gem.description: An Electric-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of an Electric-type move one time if held.

Everstone.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The Pokémon holding this peculiar stone is prevented from evolving.

Eviolite.description: A piece of Evolutions wonder. If held, a pre-evolved Pokemon's Defence and Special Defence increase.

Exp. Share.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder gets a share of a battle's Exp. Points without battling.

Expert Belt.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of supereffective moves.

Fighting Gem.description: A Fighting-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Fighting-type move one time if held.

Fire Gem.description: A Fire-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Fire-type move one time if held.

Fist Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Fighting-type moves.

Flame Orb.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bizarre orb that inflicts a burn on the holder in battle.

Flame Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Fire-type moves.

Float Stone.description: A very light stone. If held a Pokemon's weight becomes lighter.

Flying Gem.description: A Flying-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Flying-type move one time if held.

Focus Band.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder may endure a potential KO attack, leaving it with just 1 HP.

Focus Sash.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If it has full HP, the holder will endure one potential KO attack, leaving 1 HP.

Full Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an exotic-smelling incense that makes the holder bloated and slow moving.

Ghost Gem.description: A Ghost-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Ghost-type move one time if held.

Grass Gem.description: A Grass-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Grass-type move one time if held.

Green Scarf.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the “Smart” aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh.

Grip Claw.description: A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of multiturn attacks like Bind and Wrap.

Griseous Orb.description: A glowing orb to be held by GIRATINA. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Ghost-type moves.

Ground Gem.description: A Ground-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Ground-type move one time if held.

Hard Stone.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an unbreakable stone that ups the power of Rock-type moves.

Heat Rock.description: A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Sunny Day used by the holder.

Ice Gem.description: An Ice-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of an Ice-type move one time if held.

Icicle Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Ice-type moves.

Icy Rock.description: A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Hail used by the holder.

Insect Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Bug-type moves.

Iron Ball.description: A Pokémon held item that cuts Speed. It makes Flying-type and levitating holders susceptible to Ground moves.

Iron Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Steel-type moves.

King's Rock.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It may cause the foe to flinch when the holder inflicts damage.

Lagging Tail.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is tremendously heavy and makes the holder move slower than usual.

Lax Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The tricky aroma of this incense lowers the foe's accuracy.

Leftovers.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder's HP is gradually restored during battle.

Life Orb.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the power of moves, but at the cost of some HP on each hit.

Light Ball.description: An item to be held by PIKACHU. It is a puzzling orb that raises the Attack and Sp. Atk stat.

Light Clay.description: A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of barrier moves like Light Screen and Reflect used by the holder.

Luck Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It doubles a battle's prize money if the holding Pokémon joins in.

Lucky Egg.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an egg filled with happiness that earns extra Exp. Points in battle.

Lucky Punch.description: An item to be held by CHANSEY. It is a pair of gloves that boosts CHANSEY's critical-hit ratio.

Lustrous Orb.description: A beautifully glowing orb to be held by PALKIA. It boosts the power of Dragon- and Water-type moves.

Macho Brace.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stiff and heavy brace that promotes strong growth but lowers Speed.

Magmarizer.description: A box packed with a tremendous amount of magma energy. It is loved by a certain Pokémon.

Magnet.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a powerful magnet that boosts the power of Electric-type moves.

Meadow Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Grass-type moves.

Mental Herb.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It snaps the holder out of infatuation. It can be used only once.

Metal Coat.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a special metallic film that ups the power of Steel-type moves.

Metal Powder.description: An item to be held by DITTO. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts the Defense stat.

Metronome.description: A Pokémon held item that boosts a move used consecutively. Its effect is reset if another move is used.

Mind Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Psychic-type moves.

Miracle Seed.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a seed imbued with life that ups the power of Grass-type moves.

Muscle Band.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a headband that slightly boosts the power of physical moves.

Mystic Water.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a teardrop-shaped gem that ups the power of Water-type moves.

NeverMeltIce.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a piece of ice that repels heat and boosts Ice-type moves.

Normal Gem.description: A Normal-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Normal-type move one time if held.

Odd Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an exotic-smelling incense that boosts the power of Psychic-type moves.

Pink Scarf.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the “Cute” aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh.

Poison Barb.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a small, poisonous barb that ups the power of Poison-type moves.

Poison Gem.description: A Poison-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Poison-type move one time if held.

Power Anklet.description: A Pokémon held item that promotes Speed gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

Power Band.description: A Pokémon held item that promotes Sp. Def gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

Power Belt.description: A Pokémon held item that promotes Defense gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

Power Bracer.description: A Pokémon held item that promotes Attack gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

Power Herb.description: A single-use item to be held by a Pokémon. It allows the immediate use of a move that charges on the first turn.

Power Lens.description: A Pokémon held item that promotes Sp. Atk gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

Power Weight.description: A Pokémon held item that promotes HP gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

Protector.description: A protective item of some sort. It is extremely stiff and heavy. It is loved by a certain Pokémon.

Psychic Gem.description: A Psychic-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Pcyhcic-type move one time if held.

Pure Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It helps keep wild Pokémon away if the holder is the first one in the party.

Quick Claw.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A light, sharp claw that lets the bearer move first occasionally.

Quick Powder.description: An item to be held by DITTO. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts the Speed stat.

Razor Claw.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a sharply hooked claw that ups the holder's critical-hit ratio.

Razor Fang.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It may cause the foe to flinch when the holder inflicts damage.

Reaper Cloth.description: A cloth imbued with horrifyingly strong spiritual energy. It is loved by a certain Pokémon.

Red Card.description: A card with a mysterious power. If held you can cause an opponent who's hit you with a move to exit the field.

Red Scarf.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the “Cool” aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh.

Ring Target.description: If a move failed because of the opposing Pokémon's Type, this Bull's Eye will make the move hit.

Rock Gem.description: A Rock-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Rock-type move one time if held.

Rock Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an exotic-smelling incense that boosts the power of Rock-type moves.

Rocky Helmet.description: If held by a Pokemon it will give the opponent damage if hit with an attacl.

Rose Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an exotic-smelling incense that boosts the power of Grass-type moves.

Scope Lens.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a lens that boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio.

Sea Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is incense with a curious aroma that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

Sharp Beak.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a long, sharp beak that boosts the power of Flying-type moves.

Shed Shell.description: A tough, discarded carapace to be held by a Pokémon. It enables the holder to switch with a waiting Pokémon in battle.

Shell Bell.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder's HP is restored a little every time it inflicts damage.

Shock Drive.description: A Cassette that makes the move called Techno Buster become Electric-type if held by Genesect.

Silk Scarf.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of Normal-type moves.

SilverPowder.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a shiny, silver powder that ups the power of Bug-type moves.

Sky Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Flying-type moves.

Smoke Ball.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It enables the holder to flee from any wild Pokémon without fail.

Smooth Rock.description: A Pokémon held item that extends the duration of the move Sandstorm used by the holder.

Soft Sand.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a loose, silky sand that boosts the power of Ground-type moves.

Soothe Bell.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bell with a comforting chime that calms the holder and makes it friendly.

Soul Dew.description: A wondrous orb to be held by LATIOS or LATIAS. It raises both the Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

Spell Tag.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of Ghost-type moves.

Splash Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

Spooky Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Ghost-type moves.

Steel Gem.description: A Poison-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Steel-type move one time if held.

Stick.description: An item to be held by FARFETCH'D. It is a very long and stiff stalk of leek that boosts the critical-hit ratio.

Sticky Barb.description: A held item that damages the holder on every turn. It may latch on to foes that touch the holder.

Stone Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Rock-type moves.

Thick Club.description: An item to be held by CUBONE or MAROWAK. It is a hard bone of some sort that boosts the Attack stat.

Toxic Orb.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bizarre orb that badly poisons the holder in battle.

Toxic Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Poison-type moves.

TwistedSpoon.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a spoon imbued with telekinetic power that boosts Psychic-type moves.

Water Gem.description: A Water-type jewel. It will strengthen the power of a Water-type move one time if held.

Wave Incense.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is an exotic-smelling incense that boosts the power of Water-type moves.

White Herb.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It restores any lowered stat in battle. It can be used only once.

Wide Lens.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of moves.

Wise Glasses.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a thick pair of glasses that slightly boosts the power of special moves.

Yellow Scarf.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts the “Tough” aspect of the holder in a Contest in Sinnoh.

Zap Plate.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Electric-type moves.

Zoom Lens.description: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder moves after the foe, its accuracy will be boosted.

Dawn Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It sparkles like eyes.

Dragon Scale.description: A thick and tough scale. Dragon-type Pokémon may be holding this item when caught.

Dusk Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is as dark as dark can be.

Fire Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is colored orange.

Leaf Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It has a leaf pattern.

Route 6.detail: Show all forms of Deerling in Season Institute

Moon Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is as black as the night sky.

Oval Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is shaped like an egg.

Prism Scale.description: A beautiful scale that will cause a certain Pokemon to evolve. It shines in all the colours of the rainbow.

Shiny Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It shines with a dazzling light.

Sun Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is as red as the sun.

Thunderstone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It has a thunderbolt pattern.

Up-Grade.description: A transparent device filled with all sorts of data. It was produced by Silph Co.

Water Stone.description: A peculiar stone that makes certain species of Pokémon evolve. It is a clear, light blue.

Calcium.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Sp. Atk (Special Attack) stat of a single Pokémon.

Carbos.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Speed stat of a single Pokémon.

Clever Wing.description: An item used by Pokémon. It raises the Special Defence EVs of one Pokemon a little.

Genius Wing.description: An item used by Pokémon. It raises the Special Attack EVs of one Pokemon a little.

HP Up.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base HP of a single Pokémon.

Health Wing.description: An item used by Pokémon. It raises the HP EVs of one Pokemon a little.

Iron.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Defense stat of a single Pokémon.

Muscle Wing.description: An item used by Pokémon. It raises the Attack EVs of one Pokemon a little.

PP Max.description: It maximally raises the top PP of a selected move that has been learned by the target Pokémon.

PP Up.description: It slightly raises the maximum PP of a selected move that has been learned by the target Pokémon.

Protein.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Attack stat of a single Pokémon.

Rare Candy.description: A candy that is packed with energy. It raises the level of a single Pokémon by one.

Resist Wing.description: An item used by Pokémon. It raises the Defence EVs of one Pokemon a little.

Swift Wing.description: An item used by Pokémon. It raises the Speed EVs of one Pokemon a little.

Zinc.description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. It raises the base Sp. Def (Special Defense) stat of a single Pokémon.

BalmMushroom.description: A rare mushroom that will spread a nice scent around the whole area. Enthusiasts with buy them for high prices.

Big Mushroom.description: A large and rare mushroom. It is very popular among certain maniacal fan segments.

Big Nugget.description: A large orb of pure gold that shines with a golden colour. Enthusiast will buy them for high prices.

Big Pearl.description: A quite-large pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

Black Flute.description: A black flute made from blown glass. Its melody makes wild Pokémon less likely to appear.

Blue Flute.description: A blue flute made from blown glass. Its melody awakens a single Pokémon from sleep.

Blue Shard.description: A small blue shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

Comet Shard.description: A piece of a comet that fell to the Earth when a comet came too close. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Escape Rope.description: A long, durable rope. Use it to escape instantly from a cave or a dungeon.

Fluffy Tail.description: An item that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon.

Green Shard.description: A small green shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

Heart Scale.description: A pretty, heart-shaped scale that is extremely rare. It glows faintly in the colors of the rainbow.

Honey.description: A sweet honey with a lush aroma that attracts wild Pokémon when it is used in grass, caves, or on special trees.

Max Repel.description: An item that prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 250 steps after its use.

Nugget.description: A nugget of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

Pass Orb.description: A mysterious ball that encloses the power of Isshu and that you use when you use the Deru Power.

Pearl.description: A somewhat-small pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold cheaply to shops.

Pearl String.description: A large peral that shines with a beautiful silver colour. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Pok\u00e9 Doll.description: A doll that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon.

Pok\u00e9 Toy.description: An item that is used to catch a Pokemon's attention. You can escape from a wild Pokemon battle using it.

Pretty Wing.description: A very ordinary Wing that is just beautiful without effect.

Rare Bone.description: A bone that is extremely valuable for Pokémon archaeology. It can be sold for a high price to shops.

Red Flute.description: A red flute made from blown glass. Its melody snaps a single Pokémon out of infatuation.

Red Shard.description: A small red shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

Relic Band.description: A bracelet that was made by an ancient civilization some 3000 years ago. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Relic Copper.description: A bronze coin that was used by an ancient civilization some 3000 years ago. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Relic Crown.description: A crown that was made by an ancient civilization some 3000 years ago. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Relic Gold.description: A gold coin that was used by an ancient civilization some 3000 years ago. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Relic Silver.description: A silver coin that was used by an ancient civilization some 3000 years ago. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Relic Statue.description: A statue that was made by an ancient civilization some 3000 years ago. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Relic Vase.description: A vase that was made by an ancient civilization some 3000 years ago. Enthusiasts will buy them for high prices.

Repel.description: An item that prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 100 steps after its use.

Shoal Salt.description: Pure salt that was discovered deep inside the Shoal Cave. It is extremely salty.

Shoal Shell.description: A pretty seashell that was found deep inside the Shoal Cave. It is striped in blue and white.

Star Piece.description: A shard of a pretty gem that sparkles in a red color. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

Stardust.description: Lovely, red-colored sand with a loose, silky feel. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

Super Repel.description: An item that prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 200 steps after its use.

TinyMushroom.description: A small and rare mushroom. It is quite popular among certain maniacal fan segments.

White Flute.description: A white flute made from blown glass. Its melody makes wild Pokémon more likely to appear.

Yellow Flute.description: A yellow flute made from blown glass. Its melody snaps a single Pokémon out of confusion.

Yellow Shard.description: A small yellow shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

Cherish Ball.description: A quite rare Poké Ball that has been specially crafted to commemorate an occasion of some sort.

Dive Ball.description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well on Pokémon that live in the sea.

Dream Ball.description: A dream-like Pokeball that appears suddenly in your bag when you are in the Highlink Forest. It can catch any Pokemon.

Dusk Ball.description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch wild Pokémon at night or in dark places like caves.

Great Ball.description: A good, high-performance Ball that provides a higher Pokémon catch rate than a standard Poké Ball.

Heal Ball.description: A remedial Poké Ball that restores the caught Pokémon's HP and eliminates any status problem.

Luxury Ball.description: A comfortable Poké Ball that makes a caught wild Pokémon quickly grow friendly.

Master Ball.description: The best Ball with the ultimate level of performance. It will catch any wild Pokémon without fail.

Nest Ball.description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well on weaker Pokémon in the wild.

Net Ball.description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well on Water- and Bug-type Pokémon.

Pok\u00e9 Ball.description: A device for catching wild Pokémon. It is thrown like a ball at the target. It is designed as a capsule system.

Premier Ball.description: A somewhat rare Poké Ball that has been specially made to commemorate an event of some sort.

Quick Ball.description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that provides a better catch rate if it is used at the start of a wild encounter.

Repeat Ball.description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well on Pokémon species that were previously caught.

Safari Ball.description: A special Poké Ball that is used only in the Great Marsh. It is decorated in a camouflage pattern.

Timer Ball.description: A somewhat different Ball that becomes progressively better the more turns there are in a battle.

Ultra Ball.description: An ultra-performance Ball that provides a higher Pokémon catch rate than a Great Ball.

BridgeMail D.description: Letter paper that’s printed with the pattern of a crimson red draw bridge. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

BridgeMail M.description: Letter paper that’s printed with the pattern of a bridge that Arty drew. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

BridgeMail S.description: Letter paper that’s printed with the pattern of a bridge that cuts through the sky. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

BridgeMail T.description: Letter paper that’s printed with the pattern of a steel suspension bridge. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

BridgeMail V.description: Letter paper that’s printed with the pattern of a bridge made of bricks. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

Favored Mail.description: Letter paper that’s good to use when you like something. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

Greet Mail.description: Letter paper that’s good to use when you first meet someone. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

Inquiry Mail.description: Letter paper that’s good to use when you write a question to someone. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

Like Mail.description: Letter paper that’s good to use when you recommend something. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

RSVP.description: Letter paper that’s good to use when you want to invite someone. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

Reply Mail.description: Letter paper that’s good to use when you return mail from someone else. Given to a Pokemon to hold.

Thanks Mail.description: Letter paper that’s good to use when you want to express thanks.

Armor Fossil.description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that lived on the land. It appears to be part of a collar.

Claw Fossil.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a claw.

Dome Fossil.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a shell.

Helix Fossil.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a seashell.

Cover Fossil.description: The Fossil of an Ancient Pokemon that lived long ago in the ocean. It appears to be a part of its back.

Old Amber.description: A piece of amber that contains the genetic material of an ancient Pokémon. It is clear with a reddish tint.

Plume Fossil.description: The Fossil of an Ancient Pokemon that is said to be the ancestor of Bird Pokemon. It appears to be a part of its wing.

Root Fossil.description: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a plant root.

Skull Fossil.description: A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that lived on the land. It appears to be part of a head.

Bicycle.description: A folding Bicycle that enables much faster movement than the Running Shoes.

Dark Stone.description: The form of Zekrom's destroyed body. If a hero appears holding it, it will be restored.

Dowsing MCHN.description: It checks for unseen items in the area and makes noise and lights when it finds something.

Dragon Skull.description: A the skull bone of a Pokemon that used to fly freely around the sea despite the raging water.

Gracidea.description: A flower sometimes bundled in bouquets to convey gratitude on special occasions like birthdays.

Gram 1.description: An important letter delivered by Wingull.

Gram 2.description: An important letter delivered by Wingull.

Gram 3.description: An important letter delivered by Wingull.

Liberty Pass.description: A special ticket needed to go to Liberty Garden Island. You can catch a ship from Castelia City.

Light Stone.description: The form of Reshiram's destroyed body. If a hero appears holding it, it will be restored.

Lock Capsule.description: A sturdy Capsule that can only be opened with a special key.

Pal Pad.description: A convenient notepad that is used for registering your friends, Friend Codes, and keeping a record of game play.

Prop Case.description: A beautiful and cool case that will store the many and various Goods that you attach to Pokemon during Musicals.

Super Rod.description: An awesome, high-tech fishing rod. Use it by any body of water to fish for wild aquatic Pokémon.

Town Map.description: A very convenient map that can be viewed anytime. It even shows your present location.

Vs. Recorder.description: An amazing device that can record a battle either between friends or at a special battle facility.

Xtransceiver.description: The latest model transceiver with a video camera attached capable of having up to four people involved in a conversation.

TM01 Hone Claws.description: It sharpens its claws. Increases your Accuracy and Attack.

TM02 Dragon Claw.description: Slashes the foe with sharp claws.

TM03 Psyshock.description: It makes its mysterious brain waves real and attacks the opponents. It deals Physical damage.

TM04 Calm Mind.description: Raises SP. ATK and SP. DEF by focusing the mind.

TM05 Roar.description: Makes the foe flee to end the battle.

TM06 Toxic.description: Poisons the foe with an intensifying toxin.

TM07 Hail.description: Summons a hailstorm that strikes every turn.

TM08 Bulk Up.description: Bulks up the body to boost both ATTACK and DEFENSE.

TM09 Venoshock.description: It hurls a special poison. Its power doubles if it hits an opponent with Poison status.

TM10 Hidden Power.description: The effectiveness varies with the user.

TM11 Sunny Day.description: Boosts the power of FIRE- type moves for 5 turns.

TM12 Taunt.description: Taunts the foe into only using attack moves.

TM13 Ice Beam.description: Blasts the foe with an icy beam that may freeze it.

TM14 Blizzard.description: Hits the foe with an icy storm that may freeze it.

TM15 Hyper Beam.description: Powerful, but leaves the user immobile the next turn.

TM16 Light Screen.description: Creates a wall of light that lowers SP. ATK damage.

TM17 Protect.description: Evades attack, but may fail if used in succession.

TM18 Rain Dance.description: Boosts the power of WATER- type moves for 5 turns.

TM19 Telekinesis.description: It raises the opponent in the air with its psychic abilities. Attacks hit the opponent more easily for 3 turns.

TM20 Safeguard.description: A mystical force prevents all status problems.

TM21 Frustration.description: An attack that is stronger if the TRAINER is disliked.

TM22 Solarbeam.description: Absorbs light in one turn, then attacks next turn.

TM23 Smack Down.description: It attacks by throwing rocks or bullets at a flying opponent. The opponent is knocked down and falls to the ground.

TM24 Thunderbolt.description: A strong electrical attack that may paralyze the foe.

TM25 Thunder.description: A lightning attack that may cause paralysis.

TM26 Earthquake.description: A powerful quake, but has no effect on flying foes.

TM27 Return.description: An attack that increases in power with friendship.

TM28 Dig.description: Digs underground the first turn and strikes next turn.

TM29 Psychic.description: A powerful psychic attack that may lower SP. DEF.

TM30 Shadow Ball.description: Hurls a black blob that may lower the foe's SP. DEF.

TM31 Brick Break.description: Destroys barriers such as REFLECT and causes damage.

TM32 Double Team.description: Creates illusory copies to raise evasiveness.

TM33 Reflect.description: Creates a wall of light that weakens physical attacks.

TM34 Sludge Wave.description: It attacks those near it with a wave of sludge. It will sometimes cause poisoning.

TM35 Flamethrower.description: A powerful fire attack that may inflict a burn.

TM36 Sludge Bomb.description: Sludge is hurled to inflict damage. May also poison.

TM37 Sandstorm.description: Causes a sandstorm that rages for several turns.

TM38 Fire Blast.description: A fiery blast that scorches all. May cause a burn.

TM39 Rock Tomb.description: Stops the foe from moving with rocks and cuts SPEED.

TM40 Aerial Ace.description: An extremely speedy and unavoidable attack.

TM41 Torment.description: Torments the foe and stops successive use of a move.

TM42 Facade.description: Boosts ATTACK when burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

TM43 Flame Charge.description: It puts on flame and attacks the opponent. It stores strength and its speed rises.

TM44 Rest.description: The user sleeps for 2 turns, restoring HP and status.

TM45 Attract.description: Makes the opposite gender less likely to attack.

TM46 Thief.description: While attacking, it may steal the foe's held item.

TM47 Low Sweep.description: With speedy movements it aims at the opponents’ feet

TM48 Round.description: It attacks the opponent with song. If everyone sings together you can use the move in successive turns and have its power increase.

TM49 Echoed Voice.description: It attacks the opponent with an echoed voice. If it or one of its team mates uses it each turn, the power increases.

TM50 Overheat.description: Allows a full-power attack, but sharply lowers SP. ATK.

TM51 Ally Switch.description: With a strange power it teleports and switches places with one of its teammates.

TM52 Focus Blast.description: May lower foe's SP.DEF one stage

TM53 Energy Ball.description: May lower foe's SP.DEF one stage

TM54 False Swipe.description: An attack that leaves the foe with at least 1 HP.

TM55 Scald.description: It attacks by shooting boiling hot water at the opponent. It will sometimes cause a burn.

TM56 Fling.description: Hurls out held item, power depends on held item

TM57 Charge Beam.description: High chance of raising user's SP.ATT one stage

TM58 Sky Drop.description: It attacks by raising the opponent skyward on the first turn, then dropping them on the second. The opponent that has been raised cannot move.

TM59 Incinerate.description: It attacks the opponent with fire. It burns any berry the opponent is holding, rendering it unusable.

TM60 Quash.description: It holds the opponent down and makes it attack last.

TM61 Will-o-wisp.description: Inflicts a burn on the foe with intense fire.

TM62 Acrobatics.description: It lightly attacks the opponent. The damage is larger when it is not holding any item.

TM63 Embargo.description: Foe is unable to use held items

TM64 Explosion.description: Inflicts severe damage but makes the user faint.

TM66 Payback.description: Power doubles if user receives damage first

TM67 Retaliate.description: It takes revenge for a fainted teammate. If a teammate is fainted that turn the attacks power increases.

TM70 Flash.description: Looses a powerful blast of light that cuts accuracy.

TM72 Volt Switch.description: After it has attacked the opponent, it returns and switches places with a waiting Pokémon.

TM73 Thunder Wave.description: A weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the foe.

TM75 Swords Dance.description: A fighting dance that sharply raises ATTACK.

TM76 Struggle Bug.description: It opposes the opponent by attacking. It lowers the opponents Special Attack.

TM77 Psych Up.description: Copies the foe's effect(s) and gives to the user.

TM78 Bulldoze.description: It stamps the ground and attacks anything nearby. It lowers the opponent’s speed.

TM79 Frost Breath.description: It attacks by blowing a cool breath on the opponent. It will always result in a critical hit.

TM80 Rock Slide.description: Large boulders are hurled. May cause flinching.

TM82 Dragon Tail.description: It sends the opponent flying and causes the opponent to switch out. In a wild battle, the battle ends.

TM83 Work Up.description: It musters its courage and raises its Attack and Special Attack.

TM85 Dream Eater.description: Takes one half the damage inflicted on a sleeping foe.

TM86 Grass Knot.description: Power increases if foe is heavy

TM87 Swagger.description: Confuses the foe, but also sharply raises ATTACK.

TM88 Pluck.description: Power doubles if foe is holding a berry

TM89 U-turn.description: User switches out automatically after attack

Route 13.detail: Deliver all three goods to Wingull

TM90 Substitute.description: Creates a decoy using 1/4 of the user's maximum HP.

TM91 Flash Cannon.description: May lower foe's SP.DEF one stage

TM92 Trick Room.description: Slower Pokémon attacks first in 5 turns

TM93 Wild Charge.description: It covers itself in electricity and crashes into the opponent. It also takes a little damage.

TM94 Rock Smash.description: A rock-crushing attack that may lower DEFENSE.

TM95 Snarl.description: It yells at an opponent for a long time and lowers their Special Attack.

Castelia City.detail: Give Mr. Lock the Lock Capsule

HM01 Cut.description: Cuts the foe with sharp scythes, claws, etc.

HM02 Fly.description: Flies up on the first turn, then strikes the next turn.

HM03 Surf.description: Creates a huge wave, then crashes it down on the foe.

HM04 Strength.description: Builds enormous power, then slams the foe.

HM05 Waterfall.description: Charges the foe with speed to climb waterfalls.

HM06 Dive.description: Dives underwater the first turn and strikes next turn.

General.name: TM95 Snarl
General.detail: Give Mr. Lock the Lock Capsule

General.name: Leaf Stone
General.detail: Show all forms of Deerling in Season Institute

General.name: TM89 U-turn
General.detail: Deliver all three goods to Wingull
